t: @Camel3nthusiast @hammedyassir @Heal_within96 Yeah, sure, somali bantus have rights like if yall not spamming "jareer" on every bantu face. And i would like to get the link ot this study and we can discuss about it
exp: This post calls out the use of 'jareer' as spam/harassment against Bantus and questions Somali Bantu rights, appearing to criticize rather than perpetuate hate speech by pointing out discriminatory behavior.

t:
somalis in the diaspora need to learn that the kafir/murtad/dhilo/jareer gimmick you guys pull on somali women you don’t agree with will never work

we no longer reside in a shameand honour based society so either engage in good faith or admit you don’t have the range
exp: This post criticizes the use of slurs including 'jareer' along with other terms like 'kafir' (infidel) and 'murtad' (apostate) against Somali women, arguing against such harassment tactics.
This post questions the connection between Igbo people and the 'jareer and Somali' discussion, suggesting the comparison is inappropriate and exaggerated, using an analogy about European ethnicities.

t: @LakshaDeirwa @Agricultur1896 @ShantaShambara Jareer are somali. Embrace your culture

KENYA DROUGHT 
As of March 27, 2026, Kenya is facing a "drought amid plenty" scenario. While central and western regions are experiencing heavy, even flood-inducing rains, the northern and eastern Arid and Semi-Arid Lands (ASAL) remain gripped by a severe and life-threatening drought. 
  Approximate
